title: Toasted Charred Ukrainian Sweetcorn Pilaf
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring sweetcorn, served in a donabe vessel, low in glycemic index and perfect for a solo dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry and cut it into small squares.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sweetcorn, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
While the sweetcorn mixture is cooking, toast the puff pastry squares in the oven for 5 minutes, until puffed and golden brown.
To char the sweetcorn, increase the heat to high and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
To assemble the pilaf, place the toasted puff pastry squares in the bottom of a donabe vessel, then spoon the sweetcorn mixture over the top.
